name: remotion-studio

scripts.render:dataviz: npx remotion render src/index.ts DataViz-YouTube out/dataviz.mp4
scripts.render:brandfilm: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrandFilm out/brand-film.mp4
scripts.render:demo: npx remotion render src/index.ts DemoVideo-YouTube out/demo.mp4
